name: card
title: Card
description: A surface that groups related content. Supports optional title, description, action button (rendered via button registry-dep), and footer slot. Uses ZardIdDirective for aria-labelledby/aria-describedby wiring.

cena.classificationRationale: Styled composition with content slots (title, description, action, body, footer). Brain behavior is the action button (registry-dep), which is itself Helm. No state machinery beyond signal inputs + computed classes.

preferenceLedgerRows.name: signal input()/output() I/O
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: uses input() for title/description/action, output() for action click

preferenceLedgerRows.name: control-flow @if blocks
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: template uses @if for conditional title/description/action sections

preferenceLedgerRows.name: viewChild() signal queries
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: uses viewChild<ZardIdDirective>('z') for id generation reference

preferenceLedgerRows.name: Angular 21.2.13 signal APIs
preferenceLedgerRows.applies: input(), output(), computed(), viewChild() — all 21.x signals
